title: Developing a Business Continuity Plan
scenario: Develop a business continuity plan for a large manufacturing organization with multiple production lines and supply chains. The plan must include procedures for business continuity, risk management, and incident response. The output should be a comprehensive document in PDF format.
constraints: Must use a clear and consistent formatting style throughout the document
Must include a detailed table with business continuity procedures

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the plan have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the plan adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the plan include business continuity best practices and standards?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
